goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should 'arrive by 21:45' and should depart from 'leicester'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on thursday
The train should arrive by 21:45 and should depart from leicester
Make sure you get price and departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
